_note: Floors = the last-good seed agent aggregates (eval/results/20260605-103605.json: recall 1.000, mrr 0.875, faithfulness 0.762, answer_relevancy 0.706, context_precision 0.650, context_recall 0.656, judge 0.958) MINUS a tolerance for LLM-judge run-to-run noise (~0.05 on retrieval, ~0.10-0.15 on the generated metrics). They catch a real regression without flaking on noise. Raise a floor ONLY in the same PR that genuinely improves it (commit the new eval/results/* alongside); never lower one to silence a red build without a justification. See eval/README.md > Updating the baseline.
